name: Abnaa'a Wa Laken
overview: The story revolves around the wood trader of the pilgrim (stranger) and his children, and he had an injured son as a result of a car accident. The father's treatment of this son differed from the rest of his brothers. The injured son married a woman, the wife was seeking to stop between the sons of the house and the brothers of her husband in order to control and control the house to become the lady of the house.

trailers.title: Abnaa Wa Laken Series - Episode 01 | مسلسل ابناء ولكن - الحلقة الاولى
